traits.locale_text:
The user's weapon damage is calculated using their Intelligence instead of Strength and Perception instead of Weapon Skill, if those characteristics are higher.

languages.text: Les {g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}dégâts{/g} de l'arme de l'utilisateur sont calculés en fonction de son {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerIntelligence}Intelligence{/g} au lieu de sa {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerStrength}Force{/g} et de sa {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerPerception}Perception{/g} au lieu de sa {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerWeaponSkill}Capacité de combat{/g}, selon ses {g|Encyclopedia:Characteristic}caractéristiques{/g} les plus élevées.
languages.original_text: The user's weapon {g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}damage{/g} is calculated using their {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerIntelligence}Intelligence{/g} instead of {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerStrength}Strength{/g} and {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerPerception}Perception{/g} instead of {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerWeaponSkill}Weapon Skill{/g}, if those {g|Encyclopedia:Characteristic}characteristics{/g} are higher.

traits.locale_text: Les {g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}dégâts{/g} de l'arme de l'utilisateur sont calculés en fonction de son {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerIntelligence}Intelligence{/g} au lieu de sa {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerStrength}Force{/g} et de sa {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerPerception}Perception{/g} au lieu de sa {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerWeaponSkill}Capacité de combat{/g}, selon ses {g|Encyclopedia:Characteristic}caractéristiques{/g} les plus élevées.

languages.text: 如果{g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerIntelligence}智力{/g}和{g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerPerception}感知{/g}{g|Encyclopedia:Characteristic}属性{/g}更高，使用者计算武器{g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}伤害{/g}时使用智力代替{g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerStrength}力量{/g}，感知代替{g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerWeaponSkill}武器技能{/g}。
languages.original_text: The user's weapon {g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}damage{/g} is calculated using their {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerIntelligence}Intelligence{/g} instead of {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerStrength}Strength{/g} and {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerPerception}Perception{/g} instead of {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerWeaponSkill}Weapon Skill{/g}, if those {g|Encyclopedia:Characteristic}characteristics{/g} are higher.

traits.locale_text: 如果{g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerIntelligence}智力{/g}和{g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerPerception}感知{/g}{g|Encyclopedia:Characteristic}属性{/g}更高，使用者计算武器{g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}伤害{/g}时使用智力代替{g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerStrength}力量{/g}，感知代替{g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerWeaponSkill}武器技能{/g}。

languages.text:
使用者の武器{g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}ダメージ{/g} は、{g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerStrength}Strength{/g} の代わりに{g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerIntelligence}Intelligence{/g} を、{g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerWeaponSkill}Weapon Skill{/g} の代わりに{g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerPerception}Perception{/g} を使用して計算される。これらの{g|Encyclopedia:Characteristic}特性{/g} が高い場合。
使用者は{g|Encyclopedia:MeleeAttacksGlossary}近接攻撃{/g} について、+{uip|Crit|2a1df660ffcd4ae9b00803c83d0754d5}%{g|Encyclopedia:CritChancesAndCritDamageGlossary}クリティカルヒット確率{/g} を得る。

The user gains +{uip|Crit|2a1df660ffcd4ae9b00803c83d0754d5}% {g|Encyclopedia:CritChancesAndCritDamageGlossary}critical hit chance{/g} for their {g|Encyclopedia:MeleeAttacksGlossary}melee attacks{/g}.
